problem.title: Manual reconciliation — hidden losses every day
problem.description: When there are many orders, screenshot checks slow down business: you spend hours reconciling, encounter errors, and risk accepting fake receipts. Fear of blocks and tax questions forces "visual control", but it doesn't scale.

cards.title: Routine
cards.description: Reconciliation paralyzes business at 50+ orders per day.

cards.title: Stress and Control
cards.description: Manual checking seems free — but it's hours of owner time and risks.

features.title: AiPay covers the entire cycle: invoice → payment → confirmation → action → receipt
features.subtitle: You stop "catching payments" manually: the system creates an invoice, confirms payment, and triggers your process — automatically.

points.title: No Access to Withdraw Money

items.question: How long does setup take?
items.answer: Best case — from 1 day. Depends on your process and available access.

items.question: What's needed to start?
items.answer: Be a Kaspi Pay client. Cash register account needed for receipt automation.

items.question: Does this work for Instagram/Telegram sales?
items.answer: Yes. AiPay covers invoice → payment → confirmation and you can connect bot/CRM/delivery via API.

items.question: Can AiPay withdraw money or "take access"?
items.answer: No. We don't manage money withdrawal and don't make outgoing transfers.

items.question: Are custom integrations available?
items.answer: Yes. If you need to embed AiPay into site/CRM/bot — we do it per specification (paid).

items.question: What if payment "didn't match"?
items.answer: Such cases go to "exceptions": you see them in Dashboard and resolve quickly.

items.question: How do webhooks work?
items.answer: When a payment status changes, AiPay sends an HTTP POST request to your URL with payment data. Retry on errors and request signing for security are supported.

items.question: How fast is payment confirmation?
items.answer: Confirmation is instant — within seconds of the customer paying in Kaspi.

items.question: Do you support remote Kaspi payments via invoice/link?
items.answer: Yes. AiPay creates a Kaspi Pay invoice by the customer's phone number — they receive a notification and pay in one tap, without QR codes or in-person meetings.

items.question: Do I need to issue fiscal receipts?
items.answer: If you're legally required to issue receipts — yes. AiPay can automatically send a fiscal receipt to the customer after payment confirmation via integration with cash register services.

collection.title: Information We Collect
collection.content: We collect information you provide directly: name, phone number, business name, and payment transaction data necessary for service operation. We do not collect unnecessary personal data.

usage.title: How We Use Information
usage.content: We use collected data exclusively to provide AiPay services: payment verification, invoice creation, reporting, and customer support. We do not use data for marketing purposes without your consent.

storage.title: Data Storage and Security
storage.content: Data is stored on secure servers with encryption. We apply industry-standard security measures to protect your information from unauthorized access.

sharing.title: Information Sharing
sharing.content: We do not sell or transfer your data to third parties, except when necessary to provide services (e.g., payment processing) or when required by law.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. To exercise these rights, contact us via WhatsApp or Telegram.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, contact us via WhatsApp or Telegram. Contact details are available on the main page.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By using AiPay services, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please refrain from using our services.

services.title: Services Description
services.content: AiPay provides payment automation services for Kaspi Pay: invoice creation, payment verification, order matching, and fiscal receipt automation. We do not provide money withdrawal services and do not initiate outgoing transfers.

accounts.title: User Account
accounts.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. Notify us immediately of any unauthorized access to your account.

payment.title: Payment Terms
payment.content: AiPay pricing: 25,000 KZT/terminal/month (3-month minimum). The first 7 days are free trial.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: AiPay is not liable for losses caused by Kaspi system failures, incorrect data provided by users, or circumstances beyond our control. Our liability is limited to the amount paid for services.

termination.title: Termination
termination.content: Either party may terminate the agreement with 30 days notice. We reserve the right to suspend service immediately for Terms violations.

login.title: Login to Dashboard
login.description: Access your AiPay dashboard to manage payments, view reports, and configure integrations.

Customer Pays in Kaspi
Webhook "paid"
Your System Reacts

features.title: Invoice Creation
features.description: POST request with amount and phone number. Customer receives a push notification in Kaspi.

features.title: Payment Statuses
features.description: Get current status: created, paid, expired, error. Polling or webhook.

features.title: Webhook Events
features.description: HTTP POST to your endpoint on status change. Retry on errors, HMAC signing.

features.title: Fiscalization
features.description: Automatic fiscal receipt delivery through integrated cash register services.

features.title: Sandbox
features.description: Test environment for development. Payment emulation without real money.

features.title: Postman Collection
features.description: Ready-made request collection for quick start. Import and test in minutes.

faq.question: What API format?
faq.answer: REST API with JSON body. Authentication via API key in header.

faq.question: Are there rate limits?
faq.answer: Standard limit is sufficient for most integrations. Extended plans available for high loads.

faq.question: How to test without real payments?
faq.answer: Use the sandbox environment. All endpoints are identical to production, but payments are emulated.

faq.question: Do you support idempotency?
faq.answer: Yes. Pass a unique idempotency key to protect against duplicate requests.

altegio.headline: AiPay + Altegio: Kaspi Pay Prepayment for Bookings
altegio.subheadline: Automatic prepayment on Altegio bookings. Customer books → receives Kaspi invoice → pays → appointment confirmed. Fewer no-shows, more revenue.
benefits: Fiscal receipt sent to customer automatically
steps: Sign up for AiPay and get your API key
Configure webhook URL in AiPay for payment events
Set up invoice trigger on booking in Altegio
Test the flow in sandbox and launch in production

faq.question: Does Altegio need modifications?
faq.answer: No. Integration works via AiPay webhook — Altegio receives confirmation automatically.

faq.question: What if the customer doesn't pay?
faq.answer: The invoice expires automatically. You can configure a reminder or booking cancellation.

faq.question: Does it work for multiple locations?
faq.answer: Yes. Each location can have its own terminal and settings.

altegio.ctaSubtitle: Leave a request — we'll set up the integration and help with testing.

pulseai.headline: AiPay + PulseAI: Kaspi Pay in WhatsApp Bots
pulseai.subheadline: Customer writes to WhatsApp → PulseAI bot creates Kaspi invoice → customer pays → order created automatically.
benefits: Automatic payment collection directly from WhatsApp chat
steps: Sign up for AiPay and get your API key
Connect AiPay API to your PulseAI bot
Set up invoice trigger on payment request
Test in sandbox and launch

faq.question: Does it work with voice bots?
faq.answer: Yes. The API is universal — can be called from any bot, including PulseAI voice scenarios.

faq.question: Can invoices be sent within the chat?
faq.answer: Yes. The bot sends amount and phone to AiPay API, customer receives push notification from Kaspi.

faq.question: How does the bot know about payment?
faq.answer: Via webhook. AiPay sends a "paid" event — the bot continues the scenario automatically.

pulseai.ctaSubtitle: Leave a request — we'll set up payments in your WhatsApp bot.

stikerai.headline: AiPay + STIKER.AI: Kaspi Pay for Freelancers
stikerai.subheadline: Accept Kaspi Pay payments in STIKER.AI WhatsApp scenarios. For freelancers, tutors, service providers.
benefits: 1-click invoice to customer from WhatsApp bot
steps: Sign up for AiPay
Connect API to your STIKER.AI scenario
Set up automatic invoicing on order
Test and launch

faq.question: Does it work for one-time services?
faq.answer: Yes. One invoice = one API call. Works for one-time payments of any size.

faq.question: Do I need a business license?
faq.answer: You need Kaspi Pay client status. Check with Kaspi for registration details.

faq.question: Is there a minimum amount?
faq.answer: Minimum amount is determined by Kaspi Pay. No restrictions from AiPay side.

stikerai.ctaSubtitle: Automate Kaspi payment collection in your WhatsApp.

baskarupro.headline: AiPay + Baskaru Pro: Kaspi Pay Statuses in Your ERP
baskarupro.subheadline: Sync Kaspi Pay payments with Baskaru Pro. Financial statuses update automatically, bots notify your team.
benefits: Automatic payment status updates in ERP
Team notifications via bots when money arrives
steps: Sign up for AiPay and get your API key
Configure webhook to push statuses to Baskaru Pro
Map AiPay invoice fields to Baskaru Pro objects
Test the flow and launch

faq.question: What data is sent to the ERP?
faq.answer: Amount, status, date, invoice ID, payer data — everything needed for financial accounting.

faq.question: Can I set up notifications?
faq.answer: Yes. Webhook can be directed to both ERP and bots (Telegram, WhatsApp) for team notifications.

faq.question: Is 1C supported?
faq.answer: AiPay API is universal. If your 1C accepts webhooks or HTTP requests — integration is possible.
